source_intake_record.raw_question_text: The following data are for a simple steam power plant. State 6 has x6 = 0.92 and velocity of 200 m/s. The rate of steam flow is 25 kg/s, with 300 kW of power input to the pump. Piping diameters are 200 mm from the steam generator to the turbine and 75 mm from the condenser to the economizer and steam generator. Determine the power output of the turbine.
